replies.author: @Ribulose15diphosphat
replies.text:
What ???@kennethhernandez9243 Console Games cost 80€ or more and cannot be Pirated. PCs have:
1) Cheaper full price Games (Silksong vs Mario Cart ? )
2) Shareware CDs with literally hundreds of DOS-Games for 20€, as well as descent freeware games (Nethack ? )
3) A Used PC Market, there you actually get Cheaper than a Console
4) Massive Software Piracy, so you wont pay for most games.

(The Last Part Backfired honestly. Fairly Popular Franchises like Jazz Jackrabbit were abandoned as Epic barely made any profit, and EA Games focuses on low IQ-Franchises like the Simps or SPorts games, that have less Piracy than lets say Dungeon Keeper or Alice)

replies.author: @1ofZero
replies.text:
" Loved his armor. I told him. That's one great armor. We should make some of that armor for our boys. From the best armor I have seen. 
Unfortunately he didn't have one my size. But who knows maybe we will make one. 
He looked great in it to. Great guy. We got along very well.

If we had more guys like him we would be in such great shape.

I just shook his hand and was such a strong handshake. You know that man is tough. Almost as tough as me(laughs) .

We had a nice talk, lots in common too. We both avoided our fare share of bullets I will say. I guess he avoided a few more than me(Looks at Master Chief) . Right?
His shaking his head. I guess he agrees. His not a very talkative guy but I like that about him.

Any questions? No not you. You are fake news. Go ahead. Yeah the pretty young lady in the back. Go ahead. "

author: @novumdomine9925
text:
It actually improves competition and sales. Imagine living in the 90s when most of the titles you loved were on Nintendo then you had to buy a PlayStation. Don’t forget, they held exclusivity on almost everything from Final Fantasy, Tomb Raider, Crash, RE, etc cuz they could secure the sales for CDs. 
That all started changing slowly but surely with the Xbox and GameCube release but for about 5 years they gate kept everything worth playing besides Mario.

author: @deepwinter4263
text:
To those who aren't Halo nerds, to shake a Spartan II's hand is akin to risking life and limb as the MJOLNIR power armor amplifies the Spartan's movements. It requires incredible control for the Spartan to not to crush someone else's hand and few in the UNSC were willing to risk that - Captain Keyes being a notable exception.

The idea of President Trump shaking Chief Petty Officer John-117's hand is an act of trust and confidence. Truly the greatest of our time! :D

author: @Steel-101
text: First of all, I love this sense of humor from the White House and GameStop. This is perfect. Also I agree about competition. However, in my opinion, the whole “exclusive game” thing was getting old. I say that because, yeah the game may be cool, but how is the machine? I want the consoles to have better features. Like more memory(PS5 has low storage), the console being SILENT(looking at you Sony airlines), having access to more features offline(ridiculous that we can’t get offline achievements for the Xbox), do the stores have decent deals(PS store is still too expensive and the $30 Ultimate Game Pass is ridiculous), etc etc. So there’s still room for healthy competition. I own the Xbox and PS5, so I see the pros and cons for both.

author: @averagecarpentryskills7148
text: I'll miss the glory days of the 2nd console war the 00s just like I miss the 90s console war as well. I had a PS2 in the early 00s along with a Gamecube and even an original X-Box. All three had great exclusives. You played PS2 for your Silent HIlls, Re4 was on Gamecube, X-Box had Ninja Gaiden and Doom 3... I loved seeing the promos for Resistance on PS3 even if it was fake hype.. what a time.. everyone had a Wii for party games.. One of the happiest times in my life was getting out of a bad relationship and moving a cheating hoe mooch out of my house and then having expendable income for first time in long time to buy video games again and going out and getting a 360 w/ Oblivion and Gears of War 1. I have hated the modern PS4 and PS5 era of Playstation style big budget samey AAA games. I hate that it's going to be the only console now. I have long since moved over to PC for the little gaming I do still do.
